{"cards": [{"name": "Arcane Revelation", "mana_cost": "{3}{U}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["U"], "color_identity": ["U"], "type_line": "Sorcery", "oracle_text": "Choose one —
• Draw three cards, then put a card from your hand on top of your library.
• Look at the top seven cards of your library. Put two of them into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in any order.", "flavor_text": ""Knowledge flows like water—it finds its own level." —Kaelen, Azure Scholar", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "Modal blue card selection that gives meaningful choices. First mode is immediate card advantage but requires a discard decision. Second mode provides deeper selection but nets only one card. Both modes are distinctly blue and create different play patterns, testing player decision-making skills."}, {"name": "Withering Strike", "mana_cost": "{1}{B}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["B"], "color_identity": ["B"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "Destroy target non-artifact creature with mana value 3 or less.", "flavor_text": "Death finds the weak first.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Clean common removal with two restrictions: mana value limit and artifact immunity. This creates interesting targeting decisions and play patterns. The mana value restriction makes it strong early game but less relevant late, while artifact immunity provides counterplay options."}, {"name": "Graveyard Scavenger", "mana_cost": "{2}{B}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["B"], "color_identity": ["B"], "type_line": "Creature — Human Rogue", "oracle_text": "When ~ enters, exile target creature card from a graveyard.
Whenever a creature dies, you may pay {1}. If you do, return ~ from your graveyard to your hand.", "flavor_text": ""Every ending is someone else's opportunity."", "power": "2", "toughness": "2", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "ETB graveyard hate combined with recursive ability. The enter-the-battlefield effect provides immediate utility, while the death trigger creates board presence and resource advantage. The mana cost on recursion prevents it from being too oppressive while maintaining black's graveyard interaction identity."}, {"name": "Nethys, Death's Herald", "mana_cost": "{4}{B}{B}", "cmc": 6, "colors": ["B"], "color_identity": ["B"], "type_line": "Legendary Creature — Demon Cleric", "oracle_text": "Flying
When ~ enters, each opponent loses 3 life and you gain 3 life.
At the beginning of your end step, if a creature died this turn, return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand.", "flavor_text": ""Death is not the end—it is merely the first step in my service."", "power": "5", "toughness": "4", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "mythic", "design_notes": "Mythic legendary with three abilities showcasing black's strengths: evasion, life manipulation, and graveyard recursion. The ETB provides immediate board impact, while the end step trigger rewards aggressive play and creature trading. Power level appropriate for mythic with meaningful deckbuilding considerations."}, {"name": "Scorching Blast", "mana_cost": "{1}{R}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["R"], "color_identity": ["R"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "~ deals 3 damage to target creature or planeswalker.", "flavor_text": "The forge's heat pales beside a goblin's temper.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Clean common removal spell that can't target players, following modern design where creature/planeswalker damage is more acceptable at common than face damage. 3 damage for 2 mana is fair rate for removal-only spells, creating interesting decisions about when to use it versus more flexible but expensive options."}]}
